request_summary: Make temper-backend task and user-story artifacts optional by adding an approved direct-action path when Plan/INDEX.md or task files are missing.

context.notes: Previous review-blocked workflow is superseded for now by this approved change-direction investigation. Explore completed and identified prompt/skill enforcement points for task-only backend execution.

approved_plan.output: Exploration report identifying temper-backend.agent.md, friday implementation-delegation skill, friday state-schema skill, and temper-friday.agent.md as the minimal change surface.

approved_plan.description: Implement optional direct-action routing and backend-agent support while preserving the formal task-driven path.
